steps.title: Translate the input
steps.content:
In $P(x)=547(1.010)^x$, the input $x$ is the number of years after $1952$. So $x=6$ corresponds to
$$1952+6=1958$$

steps.title: Translate the output
steps.content: The output $P(x)$ is the modeled population. Therefore $P(6)$ being approximately $581$ means the modeled population in $1958$ is approximately $581$.

steps.title: Match the interpretation
steps.content: The statement that says the town's population is estimated to be approximately $581$ in $1958$ matches this interpretation. The answer is B.
